title: sarcanthus subulatus
intro: Sarcanthus subulatus, also known as the club moss or ground cedar, is a type of small, evergreen plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. Its medicinal properties include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Sarcanthus subulatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infection. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with some herbalists also using it in salves and ointments to treat skin conditions.
